features: The difference when you put them in your shoes.
Just heavenly if you suffer from cold feet.
Designed to stop the transfer of heat from your body to the cold floor.
To see our other offers, click on the 'Great Ideas' link below the item price above
description: Product description Thermal Fleece Insoles - Specially designed to stop the transfer of heat from your body to the cold floor. - Slip it into your shoes/boots/slippers etc. and you immediately feel the warmth. - The difference when you put them in your shoes. These are just the ticket if you suffer from cold feet. - Cut it to your size using the provided size guide. - Foam handle for comfort and to prevent slipping. - The base of the insole is not thick and full so as not to tighten your shoes. - You will receive two pairs of fleece insoles. **To see our other offers, click on the "Great Ideas" link below the item price above and click "Great Ideas Store" on this page. *** Indications cold feet, preventing heat transfer to cold floors Directions Slip the insoles into your shoes, boots, or slippers. Cut them to your size using the provided size guide. The base is not thick, so it won't tighten your shoes. For best results, place the insoles in your footwear to prevent heat transfer from your feet to cold floors. See more
